hero.name: Eduard
hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer who builds revenue-critical platforms across fintech, telecom, and SaaS — turning operational bottlenecks into measurable performance gains.

overview.label: What I build
overview.title: Systems that turn minutes into momentum.
overview.subtitle: I design and ship full-stack platforms that carry real operational weight — trusted by fintech and telecom clients to stay reliable under high volume.

areas.title: AI-augmented ops
areas.text: Call center automation with real-time KPI dashboards that eliminate handoff friction and cut resolution time.

areas.title: Performance engineering
areas.text: Measurable compression of service latency and query response times without sacrificing system resiliency.

areas.title: Full-stack product delivery
areas.text: NestJS backends paired with polished React and React Native interfaces — shipped end-to-end.

projects.label: Selected work
projects.title: Full-stack builds that carry operational weight.

items.title: AI Call Center Agent + Ops Dashboard
items.desc: Built an AI-powered call center workflow system for Newtech S.R.L. — full-stack delivery across a NestJS backend and a React Native (Expo) mobile KPI cockpit that operators use in real time.

items.title: Financial Services Platform
items.desc: High-volume transaction backend with 99.9% uptime, AWS S3-secured document storage, and a fast React/Vite interface optimised for operational clarity.

items.title: MangApp
items.desc: Consumer manga reading experience built for speed and polish — clean library management, smooth pagination, and a carefully crafted reading flow.

items.title: Automated Expense Parser — Backend
items.desc: Backend service that automates personal-finance ingestion by scanning and parsing bank notification emails, mapping and categorizing transactions automatically. Implemented secure Gmail OAuth2, automated polling/parsing logic, and a PostgreSQL for transaction history and categorization.

items.title: Automated Expense Parser — Mobile
items.desc: Cross-platform mobile application (React Native + Expo) for real-time expense visualization and synchronization with the mail-parsing backend. Focused on responsive charts, transaction timelines, and seamless end-to-end data sync.

stack.label: Stack fluency
stack.title: Built for scale, tested for reliability.
stack.subtitle: Fluent across the full JS/TS ecosystem and Java/C# enterprise stacks — with hands-on cloud and CI/CD experience.

highlights: Designed and built a financial services platform (NestJS + PostgreSQL + AWS S3 + React) processing high-volume transactions at 99.9% uptime.
Built an AI-powered call center agent and React Native mobile ops dashboard — end-to-end full-stack delivery.
Improved Verizon telecom platform ticket resolution time by 20% and cut SQL Server response time by 15%.
Lifted unit test coverage by 30% through Jest expansion and stricter code review standards.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs for business management using C# and .NET Core.
Implemented EF Core data access layers and a full xUnit test suite.
Developed a NestJS web-scraping API to validate government tax identifiers (RNC/NCF).
Built reusable Vue.js/Nuxt.js UI components, improving frontend delivery efficiency by 40%.
Designed and managed the PostgreSQL database schema for scalability.

cta.label: Let's work together
cta.title: Ready to compress your operational timelines?
cta.subtitle: I build full-stack platforms that remove friction, protect revenue, and deliver measurable performance gains. Let's talk.

about.title: About
about.intro: I'm a self-taught full-stack engineer based in the Dominican Republic, building software that handles real operational weight.

story.title: The story
story.text: I started with computer systems and technical support, then moved into development because I wanted to build things, not just fix them. Over 4+ years, I've worked across fintech, telecom, and SaaS, shipping platforms that process financial transactions, automate call centers, and optimize enterprise operations. I'm fluent across TypeScript, Java, and C# ecosystems, and I bring the same rigor to backend architecture as I do to frontend polish.

approach.title: The approach
approach.text: I believe in measurable outcomes over abstract claims. Every project I ship has metrics attached: uptime percentages, response time reductions, test coverage improvements. I use AI tools (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini) to accelerate delivery, not replace thinking. I write tests because I've seen production incidents. I do code reviews because I've seen technical debt compound.

looking.title: What I'm looking for
looking.text: Senior full-stack roles at remote-first companies where I can own features end-to-end, work with engineers who care about craft, and build software that matters. I'm open to contracts and full-time positions across fintech, developer tools, and operational platforms.

interests.title: Beyond code
interests.text: Digital creativity, video editing, continuous self-improvement (mental and physical), and exploring new technologies.
